scripts.dev: pnpm run rebuild:native && pnpm run build && electron dist/electron/main.js
scripts.build:electron: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config ../../electron-builder.yml --publish never
scripts.build:electron:release: pnpm run build:web && pnpm run rebuild:native && pnpm run build && electron-builder --config ../../electron-builder.yml --publish always
scripts.smoke: pnpm run build && ELECTRON_RUN_AS_NODE=1 electron dist/electron/smoke.js
